title: A solid ring represents the complete, self-contained Precept definition; three precisely cut channels at 120° are the only structural paths through it — CreateInstance, Fire, Inspect. Invalid states have no opening, so they cannot exist.
conceptualBridge: The governed ring means valid operations are structural openings because anything not cut into the contract simply has no path.
decision: Shortlisted for clearly encoding governed entry points inside a single self-contained form.
